prompt: Single matte black cordless drill resting on a workbench of unfinished softwood, soft directional north light from a workshop window, muted palette of warm wood, matte black, and a restrained warm ochre (#c8920a) accent in the background. Negative space dominates the right two-thirds of the frame. UK workshop context. No people, no text, no brand marks, no clutter. Editorial, honest, photorealistic, 35mm prime. --ar 21:9 --style raw --v 7
notes: Append --oref <anchor-url> --ow 400 when running. Variants for other power-tool/electronics categories (smartphone on desk, robot vacuum on hard floor, wireless earbuds on desk) reuse this template — swap the device noun and surface accordingly.
prompt_modifications: Live prompt diverged from locked v1 during the 2026-04-29 session. See resourcehip_website/brand/GENERATION_LOG.md for the actually-run prompt and the rationale per asset.
